summary: Completed product review for Cycle 62. Reviewed 5 completed tasks (TASK-032, 035, 038, 042, 044) and 2 in-review tasks (TASK-033, 081). Verdict: ✅ ACCEPT ALL - all tasks meet acceptance criteria and align with product vision. Identified 3 new stories for backlog: tool permission enforcement (P1), visual task DAG (P2/M3-4), and no-code agent builder (P0/M3-4). Key finding: framework is strongly TypeScript-native but not yet accessible to non-technical users (expected for Phase 1). Flagged QA bottleneck (11 tasks in review) and unverified test coverage claim (TASK-035). Review document saved to company/state/research/pm-product-review-cycle-62.md
